nodes.name: 马拉尼昂州
nodes.summary: 马拉尼昂州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联58种鸟类，包括White-browed guan、Buff-browed chachalaca、Black rail等58种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 猎捕压力
nodes.summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

nodes.name: Caatinga
nodes.summary: Caatinga是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联56种鸟类，包括白腹拟䳍、黄腿穴䳍、White-browed guan等56种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 凤冠雉科
nodes.summary: 凤冠雉科（Cracidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联56种鸟类，如山冠雉、Black guan、Sickle-winged guan等56种鸟类。

nodes.name: 米纳斯吉拉斯州
nodes.summary: 米纳斯吉拉斯州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联94种鸟类，包括小拟䳍、孤䳍、黄腿穴䳍等94种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 鸡形目
nodes.summary: 鸡形目（Galliformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联298种鸟类，如眼斑冢雉、Red-billed brushturkey、Black-billed brushturkey等298种鸟类。

nodes.name: White-browed guan
nodes.summary: White-browed guan（White-browed guan，学名 Penelope jacucaca），分类上属于鸡形目，并归入凤冠雉科，在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，主要分布于马拉尼昂州、米纳斯吉拉斯州、Caatinga，常见栖息地包括稀树草原，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、猎捕压力。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The white-browed guan is found in northeastern Brazil in an area roughly bounded by southern Maranhão, northeastern Minas Gerais, and the Atlantic coast

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The white-browed guan is found in northeastern Brazil in an area roughly bounded by southern Maranhão, northeastern Minas Gerais, and the Atlantic coast

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It inhabits several dry forest types including open angical, caatinga, restinga, and sometimes campo rupestre grassland

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It inhabits several dry forest types including open angical, caatinga, restinga, and sometimes campo rupestre grassland

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Its population has declined due to habitat destruction and hunting and it has been extirpated from some areas

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Its population has declined due to habitat destruction and hunting and it has been extirpated from some areas
